structure:ConceptScheme.common:Name: List of concepts for SEEA DSDs

structure:Concept.common:Name: Detailed description of the group of series

structure:ConceptScheme.common:Name: SDG Concept Scheme
structure:ConceptScheme.common:Description: Concept Scheme for SDG Indicators

structure:Concept.common:Name: Frequency of observation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Time interval at which observations occur over a given time period.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reference area
structure:Concept.common:Description: Country or geographic area to which the measured statistical phenomenon relates.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Sex
structure:Concept.common:Description: State of being male or female.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Age
structure:Concept.common:Description: Length of time that an entity has lived or existed.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Education level
structure:Concept.common:Description: Highest level of an educational programme the person has successfully completed.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Occupation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Job or position held by an individual who performs a set of tasks and duties.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Time period
structure:Concept.common:Description: Timespan or point in time to which the observation actually refers.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Observation status
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information on the quality of a value or an unusual or missing value.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Observation value
structure:Concept.common:Description: Value of a particular variable.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Unit multiplier
structure:Concept.common:Description: Exponent in base 10 specified so that multiplying the observation numeric values by 10^UNIT_MULT gives a value expressed in the unit of measure.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Unit of measure
structure:Concept.common:Description: Unit in which the data values are expressed.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Base period
structure:Concept.common:Description: Period of time used as the base of an index number, or to which a constant series refers.

structure:Concept.common:Name: SDG Series
structure:Concept.common:Description: SDG Indicator or Series. Uses the CETS convention for encoding.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Degree of urbanisation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Refers to Total, Urban, or Rural location.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Income or wealth quantile
structure:Concept.common:Description: Income or wealth quantile

structure:Concept.common:Name: Custom Breakdown
structure:Concept.common:Description: Used to represent user-defined breakdowns.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Composite breakdown
structure:Concept.common:Description: Represents an amalgamation of infrequently used breakdowns.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Disability status
structure:Concept.common:Description: Represents a person's disability status.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Nature of data points
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information on the production and dissemination of the data (e.g.: if the figure has been produced by the country, estimated by an international agency, etc.)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Time period details
structure:Concept.common:Description: When TIME_PERIOD refers to a date range, this attribute is used to provide metadata on the actual range the observation refers to (e.g. for period '2001-2003' TIME_PERIOD would be 2002 but the actual dates --2001-2003-- would be expressed here).

structure:Concept.common:Name: Observation-level footnotes
structure:Concept.common:Description: Additional information on specific aspects of each observation, such as how the observation was computed/estimated or details that could affect the comparability of this data point with others in a time series.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Time period or range (ISO8601)
structure:Concept.common:Description: ISO8601 representation of the actual time interval to which the observation refers

structure:Concept.common:Name: Upper bound value
structure:Concept.common:Description: Upper bound value for the indicator or series.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Lower bound value
structure:Concept.common:Description: Lower bound value for the indicator or series.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reporting type
structure:Concept.common:Description: Represents whether the official SDG series is reported by a national, regional, or international agency.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Source details
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information on the name and specific details of each observation's data source. Both the sources for the numerator and denominator could be specified here.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Economic activity
structure:Concept.common:Description: Classification of economic activities

structure:Concept.common:Name: Time series-level footnotes
structure:Concept.common:Description: Additional information on specific aspects applicable to all observations in the time series.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Geoinformation URL
structure:Concept.common:Description: Location of geoinformation

structure:Concept.common:Name: Geoinformation type
structure:Concept.common:Description: Type of geionformation provided in attribute GEO_INFO_URL

structure:Concept.common:Name: Label for custom breakdown
structure:Concept.common:Description: Information provided in the CUST_BREAKDOWN dimension, when applicable

structure:Concept.common:Name: Type of product
structure:Concept.common:Description: Type of product

structure:Concept.common:Name: Date of the most recent change of the series.
structure:Concept.common:Description: Date of the most recent change of the series.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Date last updated - last updated
Date de dernière mise à jour
Quality management - quality assessment
Gestion de la qualité - évaluation de la qualité

structure:ConceptScheme.common:Name: Test Concept Scheme
structure:ConceptScheme.common:Description: Description of test Concept Scheme

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reference area
structure:Concept.common:Description: Name of the Borrower/Counterparty

structure:Concept.common:Name: Recipient type
structure:Concept.common:Description: Type of initial recipient of financing

structure:Concept.common:Name: Recipient
structure:Concept.common:Description: Initial recipient of financing (if not the same as the Borrower/Counterparty and known at signing)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Credit provider
structure:Concept.common:Description: For bilateral financings, the lender or other credit provider (at signing)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Lead provider
structure:Concept.common:Description: Where applicable, name of the Mandated Lead Arrangers, Facility Agent/Fiscal Agent/Trustee/Transaction Intermediary or similar at signing (for syndicated deals or those with multiple providers of financing/underwriters)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Financing document datetime
structure:Concept.common:Description: Date of the principal financing document(s) (dd/mm/yyyy), or if not available, start of the quarter of the principal financing document(s) e.g. 01/10/2012, 01/07/2018)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Financing type
structure:Concept.common:Description: Description of type of financing

structure:Concept.common:Name: Currency
structure:Concept.common:Description: Currency as specified in the loan agreement

structure:Concept.common:Name: Multiple currencies
structure:Concept.common:Description: If multi-currency transaction, or transaction that has different payments in different currencies, please specify

structure:Concept.common:Name: Interest rate
structure:Concept.common:Description: Interest rate / Coupon rate / Margin

structure:Concept.common:Name: Interest rate type
structure:Concept.common:Description: Interest rate type / Coupon type

structure:Concept.common:Name: Measure
structure:Concept.common:Description: Measure

structure:Concept.common:Name: Drilldown technical dimension
structure:Concept.common:Description: Drilldown technical dimension

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reference rate benchmark
structure:Concept.common:Description: If floating, please specify the Reference Rate benchmark

structure:Concept.common:Name: Gross amount in financing document's currency
structure:Concept.common:Description: Gross amount which can be raised or borrowed

structure:Concept.common:Name: Observation value
structure:Concept.common:Description: US Dollar equivalent of gross amount at the date of the principal financing document

structure:Concept.common:Name: Grace period
structure:Concept.common:Description: Grace period - number of years

structure:Concept.common:Name: Transaction repayment
structure:Concept.common:Description: Principal transaction repayment

structure:Concept.common:Name: Frequency of observation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Repayment profile / (if bond) Coupon frequency

structure:Concept.common:Name: Repayment profile
structure:Concept.common:Description: Final repayment or maturity date (dd/mm/yyyy), or if not available, start of the final repayment or maturity date (e.g. 01/10/2012, 01/07/2018)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Repo collateral
structure:Concept.common:Description: Description of any applicable collateral/security/assets subject to repo, if any

structure:Concept.common:Name: Claim ranking
structure:Concept.common:Description: Ranking of claims (where applicable)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Financing purpose
structure:Concept.common:Description: Purpose of financing/intended use of proceeds on drawdown

structure:Concept.common:Name: Guarantor name
structure:Concept.common:Description: Name of Guarantor/Provider of indemnity, if any

structure:Concept.common:Name: Guarantee beneficiaries
structure:Concept.common:Description: Where applicable, name of the beneficiaries of the guarantee or indemnity and maximum amount payable

structure:Concept.common:Name: Financing document law
structure:Concept.common:Description: Governing law of the principal financing document(s)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Waiver of immunity
structure:Concept.common:Description: Description of waiver of sovereign immunity

structure:Concept.common:Name: Dispute resolution mechanism
structure:Concept.common:Description: Dispute resolution mechanism

structure:Concept.common:Name: Embargo time
structure:Concept.common:Description: Embargo date (dd/mm/yyyy)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Data source
structure:Concept.common:Description: Data source

structure:Concept.common:Name: ISIN
structure:Concept.common:Description: * ISIN, if available

structure:Concept.common:Name: Yield to Maturity at issuance
structure:Concept.common:Description: * Yield to Maturity at issuance (for bonds or bills)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Price at issuance
structure:Concept.common:Description: * Price at issuance (for bonds or bills)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Default event conditions
structure:Concept.common:Description: * Description of default event conditions, including cross default clause, if any

structure:Concept.common:Name: Transaction insurance
structure:Concept.common:Description: * Is the transaction insured? If yes, who is paying the insurance fee and what does it cover?

structure:Concept.common:Name: Sustainability
structure:Concept.common:Description: * Do any of the transactions have features or restrictions related to sustainability, such as ESG considerations (formally, such as ESG criteria, or informally, such as provisions that seek to support employment, health, or environmental considerations)?

structure:ConceptScheme.common:Name: Africa's Development Dynamics Statistical Annex
Annexe statistique sur la dynamique du développement en Afrique
structure:ConceptScheme.common:Description: Description of variables contained within the Africa's Development Dynamics Statistical Annex
Description des variables contenues dans l'Annexe statistique sur la dynamique de développement de l'Afrique

structure:Concept.common:Name: Measure
Mesure
structure:Concept.common:Description: Development indicators are chosen for reporting within the Africa's Development Dynamics Statistical Annex. This code list includes the full list of development indicators reported.

Les indicateurs de développement sont choisis pour les rapports dans l'Annexe statistique sur la dynamique du développement de l'Afrique. Cette liste de codes comprend la liste complète des indicateurs de développement rapportés.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Reference area
Zone de référence
structure:Concept.common:Description: Codes are ISO codes for individual countries, and three-digit codes for country groupings
Les codes sont des codes ISO pour les pays individuels et des codes à trois chiffres pour les groupements de pays.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Sex
Sexe
structure:Concept.common:Description: This code list provides coded information about the state of being male or female.
Cette liste de codes fournit des informations codées sur l’état d’être un homme ou une femme.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Degree of urbanisation
Degré d'urbanisation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Degree of urbanisation
Degré d'urbanisation

structure:Concept.common:Name: Time period
Période
structure:Concept.common:Description: Timespan or point in time to which the observation actually refers
Période ou moment auquel l'observation se réfère réellement

structure:Concept.common:Name: Observation value
Valeur d'observation
structure:Concept.common:Description: Value of a particular variable
Valeur d'une variable particulière

structure:Concept.common:Name: Resource status
État des ressources
structure:Concept.common:Description: Identifies countries which are resource-rich (extractive industries in recent years representing a significant portion of GDP)
Identifie les pays riches en ressources (les industries extractives représentant ces dernières années une part importante du PIB)

structure:Concept.common:Name: Frequency of observation
Fréquence d'observation
structure:Concept.common:Description: This code list provides a set of values indicating the "frequency" of the data (e.g. weekly, monthly, quarterly). The concept "frequency" may refer to various stages in the production process, e.g. data collection or data dissemination. For example, a time series could be disseminated at annual frequency but the underlying data are compiled monthly. The code list is applicable for all different uses of "frequency".

Cette liste de codes fournit un ensemble de valeurs indiquant la « fréquence » des données (par exemple hebdomadaire, mensuelle, trimestrielle). Le concept « fréquence » peut faire référence à différentes étapes du processus de production, par ex. collecte ou diffusion de données. Par exemple, une série chronologique pourrait être diffusée à une fréquence annuelle, mais les données sous-jacentes seraient compilées mensuellement. La liste de codes est applicable à toutes les différentes utilisations de la « fréquence ».

structure:Concept.common:Name: Year of data collection
Année de collecte des données
structure:Concept.common:Description: Where data is sparse, for the purpose of international comparison, each country is assigned the most recent measure taken between 2014 and 2023. In such cases, these data are reported under the year 2023, but with the actual year of data collection reported in the metadata.

Lorsque les données sont rares, à des fins de comparaison internationale, chaque pays se voit attribuer la mesure la plus récente prise entre 2014 et 2023. Dans de tels cas, ces données sont déclarées sous l'année 2023, mais l'année réelle de collecte des données est indiquée dans la métadonnées.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Note
Note
structure:Concept.common:Description: Supplementary information specific to individual data point.
Informations supplémentaires spécifiques à un point de données individuel.

structure:ConceptScheme.common:Name: Concept scheme for balanced international merchandise trade statistics according to CPA 2.1 and HS2017_2D, HS2017_4D, HS2017_6D
Schéma conceptuel pour les statistiques équilibrées du commerce international de marchandises selon la CPA 2.1 et le SH2017_2D, SH2017_4D, SH2017_6D
Concept scheme for balance of payments according to BPM6 and EBOPS 2010

structure:Concept.common:Name: Measure
Mesure
structure:Concept.common:Description: Identifies balance of payments items according to BPM6 and EBOPS2010.
Identifie les postes de la balance des paiements selon le MBP6 et l'EBOPS2010.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Accounting entry
Ecriture comptable
structure:Concept.common:Description: Identifies the type of accounting entry: for transactions on current and capital account components, whether the time series is a revenue, an expenditure, or the balance of revenue minus expenditure; for positions and transactions data in the financial account, whether the time series refers to assets (or the net acquisition of), liabilities (or the net incurrence of), or a net position, defined as assets minus liabilities.

Identifie le type d'écriture comptable : pour les transactions sur les composantes du compte de transactions courantes et du compte de capital, si la série temporelle est une recette, une dépense ou le solde des recettes moins les dépenses ; pour les données sur les positions et transactions dans le compte financier, si la série temporelle se réfère aux actifs (ou à leur acquisition nette), aux passifs (ou à leur accroissement net), ou à une position nette, définie comme les actifs moins les passifs.

structure:Concept.common:Name: Flow or stock entry
Flux ou stock
structure:Concept.common:Description: Identifies whether the time series is a transaction (flow), a position (stock), or a change in position not due to transactions (e.g., revaluations).
Indique si la série temporelle est une transaction (flux), une position (stock) ou un changement de position non dû à des transactions (par exemple, réévaluations).
